shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,140p' src/components/Tooltip/TooltipTypes.d.ts && rg -n \"computeTooltipPosition|tooltipStyles|__place|react-tooltip\" README.md docs src -g '"'!src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx'"' | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' src/utils/compute-positions.ts && sed -n '38,75p' src/utils/compute-positions-types.d.ts && sed -n '210,240p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx && sed -n '450,480p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx && sed -n '518,535p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-tooltip actual placement CSS class" --space default'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"In react-tooltip, expose Floating UI's resolved tooltip side from computeTooltipPosition as a normalized placement result, store it in Tooltip state after each successful position computation, and render it as the root class react-tooltip__place-<placement>. This keeps placement-specific CSS aligned with auto-flipped, float, anchor-change, and content-size recalculations while avoiding a guessed class before the first computation.\" -t \"react-tooltip exposes resolved placement class\" --unit-type decision -l react-tooltip -l positioning -s codex -i 0.7 --when present"
